name: Calico Fruit Bars
recipeInstructions:
Bars
1. Grease and flour a 10x15 inch jelly roll pan.
2. Spoon the flour lightly into a measuring cup and measure off.
3. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients and stir until blended.
4. Spread mixture in prepared pan.
5. Bake 30-40 minutes in a preheated 350°F oven until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
Glaze
1. Combine all glaze ingredients in a bowl.
2. Add enough milk to achieve a spreading consistency.
3. Remove bars from the oven and brush with glaze.
4. Let cool completely, then cut into 48 bars.
5. Store in the refrigerator.
